table ip filter {
	chain output {
		type filter hook output priority filter; policy accept;
		oifname "sb-tun0" accept
		udp dport 5353 counter packets 0 bytes 0 drop comment "mdns-drop"
		udp dport 5355 counter packets 0 bytes 0 drop comment "llmnr-drop"
		counter packets 3 bytes 192 log prefix "sbfw-drop " drop
	}
}
table ip6 filter6 {
	chain output6 {
		type filter hook output priority filter; policy drop;
		oif "lo" accept
	}
}
